name: deepseek-codex-combo
description: DeepSeek V4 Pro/Flash harness for Codex.

interface.longDescription: DeepSeek Codex Combo provides a Codex-compatible DeepSeek V4 harness with local proxying, model routing, MCP declarations, companion hooks, planner skills, and evidence-first workflow support.
defaultPrompt: Use DeepSeek Codex Combo to inspect the current project plan.
Validate the DeepSeek proxy and plugin skeleton before installation.
